title: 3 Pack Cotton String Balls Kitchen Twine 135M Butchers String Durable White Twine for Meat, Cooking, Gardening, DIY, Crafting, and Gift Wrapping (45M Each)
features: Durable Natural Cotton Twine: Strong and reliable cotton string suitable for kitchen, gardening, and everyday household use.
Perfect for Cooking & Butchers: Ideal for trussing meat, tying poultry, and other cooking needs – safe for food preparation.
Multi-Purpose Twine: Great for DIY projects, crafting, gardening, gift wrapping, and household bundling tasks.
Generous Length: Each roll measures 45 meters, giving you a total of 135 meters of durable white twine across 3 balls.
Easy to Use & Store: Compact string balls are tangle-free, easy to cut, and convenient to store in your kitchen or toolbox.
KEEP AWAY FROM CHILDREN UNDER 3 YEARS OF AGE
description: This 3 Pack Cotton String Balls Kitchen Twine is a versatile and durable solution for cooking, crafting, and everyday tasks. Made from strong natural cotton, it is safe for use with food, making it ideal for tying meat, poultry, or preparing roasts. Each ball contains 45 meters of twine, giving you a total of 135 meters of high-quality string – plenty for cooking, gardening, gift wrapping, DIY projects, or household bundling. Lightweight, easy to cut, and conveniently stored, this cotton twine is designed to handle multiple uses while staying strong and reliable. A must-have for every home, kitchen, or workshop.
